title: IDE Host to GUI Message
description: Strict host bootstrap, active editor context, current sanitized controlled IDE action progress/results, bounded controlled replacement edit results, and confirmed edit proposal results only. Controlled IDE action messages are local-only read/context/navigation status messages and must not expose secrets, private absolute paths, raw contents, shell output, git output, task output, provider responses, arbitrary payloads, raw diffs, or raw replacement bodies.

selection.description: Bounded active user-selected prompt context only. Selection text is not valid IDE action metadata and does not grant file read, edit, shell, task, git, tool, provider response, or raw prompt authority.

enum: Run the focused GUI application test gate.
Run the focused engine chat test gate.

description.const: Run the focused GUI application test gate.
Run the focused engine chat test gate.
